Name: Clobbopus
Effects: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

Name: Alolan Dugtrio
Effects: If you don't have exactly 3 cards in your hand, this attack does nothing.

Name: Skarmory
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Flapple
Effects: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Appletun
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.
This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

Name: Slakoth
Effects: Heal 60 damage from this Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't retreat.

Name: Kecleon
Ability-Effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Braviary
Effects: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. This attack does 40 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

Name: Durant ex
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Scovillain ex
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [G] and [R] type.
Effects: This attack does 70 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Milotic ex
Ability-Effect: Prevent all damage from and effects of attacks from your opponent's Tera Pokémon done to this Pokémon.
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Black Kyurem ex
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [N] Pokémon, it is now Paralyzed.
This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Pikachu ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon has full HP and would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, it is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.
Effects: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Latias ex
Ability-Effect: Your Basic Pokémon in play have no Retreat Cost.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Palossand ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
Put damage counters on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon until its remaining HP is 100.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Flygon ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
This attack does 100 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon ex and Pokémon V. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hydreigon ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.
This attack also does 130 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Archaludon ex
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Basic [M] Energy cards from your discard pile to your [M] Pokémon in any way you like.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Alolan Exeggutor ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: You may attach any number of Basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.
Flip a coin. If heads, Knock Out your opponent's Active Basic Pokémon. If tails, Knock Out 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tatsugiri ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Look at the top 10 cards of your deck. You may put any number of Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Slaking ex
Ability-Effect: If your opponent has no Pokémon ex or Pokémon V in play, this Pokémon can't attack.
Effects: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Cyclizar ex
Tera-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent’s).
Effects: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
You may draw 5 cards.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Clemont's Quick Wit
Description: Heal 60 damage from each of your [L] Pokémon.

Name: Cyrano
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon ex, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Drasna
Description: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, draw 8 cards. If tails, draw 3 cards.

Name: Drayton
Description: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon and a Trainer card you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Jasmine's Gaze
Description: During your opponent's next turn, all of your Pokémon take 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (This includes new Pokémon that come into play. )

Name: Lisia's Appeal
Description: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, the new Active Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Surfer
Description: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.
